ddls:
CREATE TABLE "auctions" (
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being auctioned */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller hosting the auction */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the item (e.g., Used, New, Open box) */,
  "ended_time_weekday" INTEGER /* Weekday of the auction end time */,
  "ended_time_weekend" INTEGER /* Weekend of the auction end time */,
  "num_bidders" INTEGER /* Number of bidders in the auction */,
  "bids" INTEGER /* Total number of bids in the auction */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the auction in days */,
  "hasItemDesc" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the item has a detailed description */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the auction */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the auction */,
  "reserve_price" TEXT /* Minimum price the seller is willing to accept */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping the item */,
  "auction_status" TEXT /* Current status of the auction (e.g., Open, Closed, Canceled) */,
  "final_bid_amount" TEXT /* Final bid amount of the auction */,
  "final_bidder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the final bidder */,
  "auction_location" TEXT /* Location where the auction is taking place */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the auction is featured */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the auction (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auctions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auctions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the item */,
  "item_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item (e.g., 10x20x30 cm) */,
  "item_color" TEXT /* Color of the item */,
  "item_materials" TEXT /* Materials used in the item */,
  "item_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the item */,
  "item_warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the item in months */,
  "item_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the item (e.g., In Stock, Out of Stock) */,
  "item_condition_details" TEXT /* Detailed condition of the item (e.g., minor scratches, no defects) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "seller_country" TEXT /* Country of the seller */,
  "seller_feedback_pct" INTEGER /* Percentage of positive feedback */,
  "seller_feedback_positive" INTEGER /* Number of positive feedbacks */,
  "seller_feedback_neutral" INTEGER /* Number of neutral feedbacks */,
  "seller_feedback_negative" INTEGER /* Number of negative feedbacks */,
  "seller_member_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of seller's membership on the platform in days */,
  "seller_email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "seller_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "seller_address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "seller_website" TEXT /* URL to the seller's website */,
  "seller_social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the seller's social media profiles */,
  "seller_rating_average" TEXT /* Average rating of the seller */,
  "seller_total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales by the seller */,
  "seller_total_earnings" TEXT /* Total earnings of the seller */,
  "seller_last_active" TEXT /* Last active date and time of the seller */,
  "seller_verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the seller (e.g., Verified, Unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the category */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "category_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the category (e.g., number of items, views) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  "brand_social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the brand's social media profiles */,
  "brand_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "brand_headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the brand's headquarters */,
  "brand_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the brand (e.g., number of followers, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bidders" (
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bidder */,
  "bidder_name" TEXT /* Name of the bidder */,
  "bidder_email" TEXT /* Email address of the bidder */,
  "bidder_country" TEXT /* Country of the bidder */,
  "bidder_member_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of bidder's membership on the platform in days */,
  "bidder_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the bidder */,
  "bidder_address" TEXT /* Address of the bidder */,
  "bidder_credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the bidder */,
  "bidder_bidding_history" TEXT /* JSON object containing the bidder's bidding history */,
  "bidder_total_bids" INTEGER /* Total number of bids made by the bidder */,
  "bidder_total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of auctions won by the bidder */,
  "bidder_last_active" TEXT /* Last active date and time of the bidder */,
  "bidder_verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the bidder (e.g., Verified, Unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auction the bid was placed in */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bidder who placed the bid */,
  "bid_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the bid */,
  "bid_time" TEXT /* Time the bid was placed */,
  "bid_status" TEXT /* Status of the bid (e.g., Active, Won, Lost) */,
  "bid_payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the bid (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "bid_shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the bid */,
  "bid_shipping_status" TEXT /* Shipping status of the bid (e.g., Shipped, Delivered, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auction_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auction the feedback is for */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bidder who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the feedback (1-5) */,
  "feedback_comment" TEXT /* Comment provided in the feedback */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Time the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_anonymity" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "feedback_usefulness" INTEGER /* Rating of the feedback's usefulness (1-5) */,
  "feedback_response" TEXT /* Response from the seller to the feedback */,
  "feedback_response_time" TEXT /* Time the response was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auction_feedback_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auction_feedback_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seller_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller the feedback is for */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bidder who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the feedback (1-5) */,
  "feedback_comment" TEXT /* Comment provided in the feedback */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Time the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_anonymity" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "feedback_usefulness" INTEGER /* Rating of the feedback's usefulness (1-5) */,
  "feedback_response" TEXT /* Response from the seller to the feedback */,
  "feedback_response_time" TEXT /* Time the response was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seller_feedback_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seller_feedback_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, marketing) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "user_activation_status" TEXT /* Activation status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_security_questions" TEXT /* JSON object containing security questions and answers */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing user preferences (e.g., notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
